title: Define the M1 hauling building vertical scenario contract
summary: Specify the first executable gameplay scenario as hauling materials into a build site, including fixture bounds, invariants, reason expectations, and non-goals so implementation does not drift into broad content production.
acceptance: Scenario uses hauling/building as the first vertical slice and explicitly excludes broad production/content expansion
Fixture defines map size, item stacks, storage slots, build site, pawns, command stream, seeds and tick horizon
Acceptance lists invariants for reservations, carried items, material counts, build progress, reason traces and no queue growth
Allowed and forbidden paths are documented for implementation tasks

history.details: Defined M1 hauling/building scenario contract m1.hauling_building.road_lantern_frame.v1 with fixture bounds, command stream, expected end state, invariants, failure reasons, pillar guardrails and implementation path constraints; required checks pass.

verified: No blocking findings; scenario contract is executable and specific, required checks pass, broad content/production remains forbidden, and downstream allowed/forbidden implementation paths are explicit.
